methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Syria raid and Iran diplomatic flare raise Turkey border security concerns
bullets: Uzbek fighters were seized in a Syrian raid near the Turkish border, raising spill‑over risk.
Trump‑linked Iran tensions and a US ultimatum heighten the threat of cross‑border retaliation.
Georgia's internal unrest shows regional instability but poses no direct border threat.
